MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-07-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Courtcall:
Daniel Wayne, Esq., 415-649-6203, appearing for William Puckett, Plaintiff
Michael Karator, Esq., 510-763-2324, appearing for Lucy Huntgate, for Defendant

ARGUED. Mr. Wayne stated that he contested to the tentative ruling, that there is no statement as to why the motion is being granted and presented his oral argument in support of his postion. Mr. Karator respectfully disagreeed and provided case background.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LUCY HUNGATE MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Cross-Complaint is GRANTED.Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-24-2020 Continued To Oct-07-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LUCY HUNGATE's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Cross-Complaint is Continued to October 7, 2010 at 9:30 a.m. to be heard in Dept. 501, which hears all law and motion matters for cases arising out of ownership, possession, and acquisition of real property and damage to real property.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
